paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.23 as of 2026-07-23, representing a decrease of 5.4 percent from the prior close and 28.37 percent over the last 22 trading sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.
The recent news includes an announcement from PR Newswire on 2026-07-23 regarding the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form on 2026-07-21 disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on 2026-07-15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There was also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
